title: calonemorchis citrina
intro: Calonemorchis citrina, also known as the golden bird orchid, is a species of orchid native to New Guinea. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, containing flavonoids and phenolic compounds that exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Calonemorchis citrina include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In traditional medicine, Calonemorchis citrina is prepared as a decoction or tincture for its therapeutic uses, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
